ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip started */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the starting station */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip ended */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ending station */,
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bike used in the trip */,
  "subscriber_type" TEXT /* Type of subscriber (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the subscriber */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "is_round_trip" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip is a round trip */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., city, park, scenic) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike used */,
  "gps_coordinates_start" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the start location */,
  "gps_coordinates_end" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the end location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_number FOREIGN KEY ("bike_number") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "terminal_number" INTEGER /* Terminal number at the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the station data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Use, Maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* History of maintenance performed on the bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level for electric bikes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscriber */,
  "subscriber_type" TEXT /* Type of subscriber (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the subscriber */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the subscriber */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the subscriber */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subscriber */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the subscriber */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the subscriber */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription is currently active */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method for the subscriber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the bike that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next due date for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bike_number FOREIGN KEY ("bike_number") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_stats" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the station */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips that started from the station */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips starting from the station */,
  "peak_time" TEXT /* Peak usage time at the station */,
  "total_bikes" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes available at the station */,
  "average_bike_age" REAL /* Average age of bikes at the station */,
  "average_trip_distance" REAL /* Average distance of trips starting from the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the usage stats were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trip associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user about the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback was provided anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trip associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the trip */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Mobile App) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id")
)
